name: ultra-explainer
description: Turn code, systems, diffs, plans, data, and concepts into strikingly clear self-contained HTML — re-skinned by a 'chameleon studio' of seven distinct design languages (blueprint, editorial, terminal, instrument, notebook, swiss, luminous) chosen to fit the subject. Node-edge graphs, annotated diffs, honest charts, interactive models, step-throughs, themed Mermaid, slides; light/dark themes and an optional glow layer.
